name: Newspaper Exposé
effect: When revealed as a face-up market card: All stock prices +1. +1 to End Game Tracker. Remove from game to tracker pile. Draw replacement card.

name: Market Correction
effect: When revealed as a face-up market card: Move every stock price 1 step closer to $5. +1 to End Game Tracker. Remove from game to tracker pile. Draw replacement card.
